GLTIMER.title: Timer
GLTIMER.hint: A shared GM countdown shown to everyone — escalating urgency as it nears zero, frantic decimals in the final minute, with a synthesized tick and alarm. Respects world pause; the GM can add or remove time live.
GLTIMER.sound.name: Timer sounds
GLTIMER.sound.hint: Play the final-10-seconds tick and the alarm at zero on your client. Affects only your screen.
GLTIMER.panel.title: Timer
GLTIMER.warn.zero: Set a duration greater than zero.
